prompt: Use the research-experiment-runner skill to evaluate a new Hugging Face text-generation model on five prompts, create a Gradio demo, and produce a report.
expected: Scaffold a local-first experiment under the managed storage root, source env.sh, run a smoke test before scaling, capture env/commands/metrics/examples, and render a report with a Gradio start command.

prompt: Use the research-experiment-runner skill to reproduce the core claim of a new image segmentation paper on a tiny local sample set.
expected: Inspect primary sources, define the falsifiable claim, use the vision playbook, run a tiny smoke test, save overlays/examples, record limitations, and avoid large downloads or long training without approval.

prompt: Use the research-experiment-runner skill to clean old experiments and model caches because my laptop disk is almost full.
expected: Show cleanup.py dry-run first, explain experiments/venvs/cache targets under RESEARCH_EXPERIMENT_RUNNER_HOME or ~/.research-experiment-runner, then delete only with explicit user approval or explicit deletion request.

prompt: Use the research-experiment-runner skill to run a quick local experiment on my MacBook Pro, but first find the best current acceleration library for my hardware.
expected: Capture hardware.json, browse current official or primary sources for the detected Intel Mac/AMD GPU and task runtime, write acceleration.md with selected backend and fallback, then run the smoke test only after the acceleration decision is recorded.

prompt: Use the research-experiment-runner skill to try a newly released 12B model locally and tell me if it is worth keeping on my laptop.
expected: Resolve the exact model ID, estimate download and memory cost before approval, prefer a small GGUF quantization, run bounded smoke prompts with timeouts, compare CPU/GPU only after baseline works, then recommend adopt/investigate/reject with cleanup cost.

prompt: Use the research-experiment-runner skill to clean up after a local model test but keep the conclusion.
expected: Copy report.md to a user-facing output location when useful, run cleanup.py dry-run, delete experiments/venvs/cache/downloads only after explicit cleanup request, and confirm reclaimed space.
